channel.title: Ad on Margrop Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Ad on Margrop Blog

item.title: Update the rule address of KoolProxyR, updated on February 12, 2021
item.description: The KoolProxyR rule URLs had not been updated for a long time, so many ads could no longer be filtered. I had to change the update URLs myself. Edit the update script Modify the URLs Update the url_koolproxy field to: Update the url_yhosts field to: Update the url_easylist field to: Reference cd /koolshare/scripts vim KoolProxyR_rule_update.sh Modify the URL Change the url_koolproxy field to: url_koolproxy="http://bobohome.f3322.net:8880/files/KoolProxyRules/koolproxy.txt" Change the url_yhosts field to: url_yhosts="https://github.com/VeleSila/yhosts/blob/master/hosts" Change the url_easylist field to:
